articles.author: Kaitlin Sullivan
articles.title: FDA pulls proposed rule barring teens from using tanning beds - NBC News
articles.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday withdrew a proposed rule that would have barred all Americans under age 18 from using tanning beds.
articles.content:
The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday withdrew a proposed rule that would have barred all Americans under age 18 from using tanning beds.

articles.author: Lucia Viti
articles.title: Colorectal cancer is top killer for young adults. A 5K helps raise awareness - St. Augustine Record
articles.description: Colorectal cancer is the top cancer killer for Americans under 50. A 5K race promotes early screening and awareness.
articles.content: The death of James Van Der Beek at age 48 placed colorectal cancer in the spotlight once again. Chadwick Boseman, Charles M. Schulz, Audrey Hepburn and Vince Lombardi were among the notables who also… [+3101 chars]
